calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-14-2026 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Apr-29-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:58am and concluding at 10:15am.

Plaintiff Citizens Bank, N.A. appearing represented by Eillen Ortesa, Esq. via zoom.
Defendant Gonzalo Castellon not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines witness for Plaintiff and Vender Managment Specialist TALLY GERIMIA and she confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Citizens Bank, N.A., and against Defendant Gonzalo Castellon, as follows:

Damages: $35,389.36
Prejudgment Interest: 0
Attorney Fees: $0
Costs: $530.80
Waiting Time Penalty: $0

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $35,920.16

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.
